storyboard.content: I have severe, sharp pain in my lower right abdomen that has been there since early this morning and is not going away.
I feel really nauseous and I have already thrown up twice today.
I think I have a fever.
The pain started around my belly button this morning and then moved to the lower right side over about twelve hours, and it keeps getting worse.
The pain is about an eight out of ten — it is sharp and constant, and it is hard to walk or move because of it.
The pain gets noticeably worse when I try to walk or move around. I have had no appetite at all today.
